releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- New setting `Placeholder property name` added
- Refactoring
  - Fixed header link name #3
  - Fixed event handlers registration
  - Commands moved to commands.ts file
- Optimization

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.5...2.1.6

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - Fixed headers custom separating
  - EOL CRLF replaced by LF
  - Using DRY: removing circumflex from block link moved to util function;
  - Now link has correct data-href (without special headers)
  - Async functions that doesnt using await are made sync
  - JSDoc updated
  - Event listeners are automatically destroys with method `registerEvent`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.4...2.1.5

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - Optimized imports
  - Classes exports default

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.3...2.1.4

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - Reorganized code
  - Modal for placeholder adding closes if error occurs
- Added command to open modal for placeholder adding

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.2...2.1.3

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - Using "Sentence case" instead of "Title Case" in user interface (UI)
  - Using MetadataCache API instead of js-yaml
  - The header with the name of the plugin has been removed from the settings
  - Fixed a special `sep` header for in-note links

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.1...2.1.2

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - Add code documentation
  - Removed ToDo comments
  - lookbehind, which is not supported on iOS versions earlier than 16.4, has been removed from replacer
  - Type conversion has been removed in noteMapper, type checking via instanceOf has been added

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.1.0...2.1.1

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring
  - lookbehind, which is not supported on iOS versions earlier than 16.4, has been removed from noteFinder
- Add features
  - Handling internal links that don't link to notes

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/2.0.0...2.1.0

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring:
  - View replacer module
  - Separate file for types
  - Separate file for note finder
  - Separate file for note mapper
  - Separate file for properties parser
- Add features
  - Add feature, that separates placeholder and headers/block. Does not apply when disabling the placeholder or specifying the name of the link.
  - Add text to use as separator between headers/block
  - Add note Map for quick notes search
  - Add additional notices for placeholderPropertyModal
- Optimization
  - Deleted redundant parser
- Add comments
- Debug
  - Reloading replacer processor after changing settings

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/1.0.1...2.0.0

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
# What's Changed
- Refactoring:
  - Settings Tab
    - Using `Obsidian HTML Elements` instead of `innerHTML`

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1

releases.author: XZSt4nce
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Initial release by @XZSt4nce in https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/pull/2
* Add features
  * Add button to add `placeholder` property
  * Add replacing link name to placeholder
  * Add feature that replaces all internal links to placeholder, even link has name
  * Add text to disable replacing link name to placeholder

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/XZSt4nce/note-placeholder/commits/1.0.0
